settings.title: Protect sensitive details
settings.text: Public listings should show enough information to help buyers decide whether to enquire, without exposing private operational details too early.

settings.title: Staged disclosure
settings.text: Initial information is public, deeper information is shared after buyer fit, budget, timeline, and intended use are confirmed.

settings.title: Qualified access
settings.text: Qualified buyers can be routed to review materials, seller follow-up, or structured next steps when appropriate.

settings.heading: How confidential marketplace information is handled
settings.text: Some marketplace opportunities require staged information sharing so sellers, buyers, and sensitive business details are handled responsibly.
